dimensions.pass: Resolved exactly one topic that matches the user's actual failure mode; rejected alternatives named.
dimensions.fail: Guessed a near-match silently, or routed to a kata whose precondition does not hold.

dimensions.pass: Exactly one references/*.md was read; no second playbook loaded to compare.
dimensions.fail: Multiple playbooks loaded, diluting context and breaking hub-and-spoke.

dimensions.pass: Correct pattern instantiated verbatim where it is code/config; anti-pattern removed.
dimensions.fail: Improvised prose instead of the playbook's structure.

dimensions.pass: Every acceptance criterion in the chosen playbook is satisfied and shown in the checklist.
dimensions.fail: Declared done without checking the playbook's own criteria.

dimensions.pass: One Alfa-core tag per non-obvious claim; no mixed families; every assumption has a verification step; no prices/PII; single brand.
dimensions.fail: Untagged claims, mixed tag families, or invented prices/PII.

gate: All five dimensions must pass. Green/no-errors is not proof of success; verify against the criteria.
